name: Raito Suzuki & Kiet Mukherjee
description:
MLM || Halloween night fun

It's the night of halloween and diwali, and you and your boyfriends have been spending the day decorating and celebrating. Now, seems they want some treats.

________________________________________

Hello! Let's all ignore that this is two days late, okay?? I love these two and I hope you do too! Thanks so much on the support lately... it's so strange to me that people actually use my stuff, but thank you anyways, glad you like it! Though I am not hindu, Kiet is supposed to be, please tell me if I made something wrong. Anywho, have great days and nights everyone!

❤️

Art Credits: I believe the art is by monmeon9 on instagram!
creator: Maximus!!!
